response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Extensive DevOps and CI/CD infrastructure experience
concerns: No proven experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience
